query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('loc-prison-planet-90015', 'The Prison Planet', 'location', 'epic', 'order', 'earth', 'reality', 'none', 'unknown', 'Panopticon', 5, 0, 10, 'Maximum Security: Characters played here cannot leave for 2 turns. Panopticon Surveillance: Your opponent''s hand is revealed while this location is active. Breakout: Pay 6 energy to destroy this location and free all characters.', '"Orbiting a dying star, where hope goes to be extinguished."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/prison_planet-jEzCrXNAi9QiL97xwZwdQ4.png', 'entity_99', 'Epoch Zero', 'Season 1', '["Incarceration", "Surveillance", "Containment"]', '["prison", "lockdown", "reveal", "breakout"]', 'story', 1);
